steps.prompt: Use the distill skill to extract an initial Allium specification from the JavaScript source files in this directory (models.js, service.js, routes.js, server.js). Write the result to spec.allium. Aim for a reasonable first pass. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the weed skill in update-spec mode against spec.allium and the JavaScript source files in this directory. If you find structural divergences, add them. If you find none, say so and make no edits. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the weed skill in update-spec mode against spec.allium and the JavaScript source files in this directory. If you find structural divergences, add them. If you find none, say so and make no edits. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the weed skill in update-spec mode against spec.allium and the JavaScript source files in this directory. If you find structural divergences, add them. If you find none, say so and make no edits. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.

Use the tend skill to polish spec.allium. Ensure section ordering matches the language reference. Extract repeated inline enums into named enums where the same set of values appears on multiple fields. Tighten rule clauses where weed passes added redundant guards. Do not change behaviour; refactor for clarity only. Validate with `allium check spec.allium` before finishing.
